name: Fault-Trained Sentinel
visual_description: A human soldier in white plate armor stands rigid in a defensive stance, one gauntleted hand raised to shield. Their posture is stiff and mechanical, as if frozen mid-motion. Weathered metal plating shows faint scorch marks and repair seams, suggesting past failures. Alert eyes peer forward from beneath a reinforced helm.
full_prompt: A human soldier in white plate armor stands rigid in a defensive stance, one gauntleted hand raised to shield. Their posture is stiff and mechanical, as if frozen mid-motion. Weathered metal plating shows faint scorch marks and repair seams, suggesting past failures. Alert eyes peer forward from beneath a reinforced helm.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
